headings.text: Dissecting Browser Artefacts I: Mozilla Firefox

overview: Aside from the applications that are prone to threat actors' activities, browser applications are also a treasure trove of information when it comes to digital forensics. This is because most user-targeted attacks nowadays are being delivered through the web.

study.overview: Aside from the applications that are prone to threat actors' activities, browser applications are also a treasure trove of information when it comes to digital forensics. This is because most user-targeted attacks nowadays are being delivered through the web.
